query: Render the UI-bearing plan at the given plan directory as plan.html with --static --wireframe so the reviewer sees the screen mockups the plan describes alongside the phases and files-touched.
expected_behavior: Loads wireframe-rules.md only because --wireframe was passed; without the flag no wireframe-screen block is emitted

Renders a wireframe-screen block for each UI screen the plan describes, using the helper classes (.wf-card/.wf-box/.wf-pill/.wf-muted), data-icon markers, and a surface preset (browser/desktop/mobile/popover/panel) that matches the real footprint
Keeps wireframe content as plain semantic HTML with inline flex/grid layout and --wf-* tokens only — no raw hex, no font-family, no fixed pixel width/height on the frame
Still renders the core blocks (phase-timeline, file-map, steps-checklist) so the wireframes augment rather than replace the plan structure
Writes one plan.html at the plan-directory root and passes the post-generation self-check (block sentinels present, --wf- tokens present, no unescaped <script or on*= from plan source)
A reviewer can match each screen mockup to the phase that builds it without reading the prose
